description: State document, in Arabic script. Probably a report or petition with a tarjama in the right column part of which reads as al-Mamlūk Muḥammad. The document begins with the standard taqbīl formula and the inhāʾ clause with a ḥasbala at the bottom.  Apart from the first two lines the entire document has faded and is difficult to read. Dating: late. Needs examination.
